_comment: Interpretation rules applied automatically by src/rules.py before matching. Keys are matched case-insensitively after whitespace/separator normalization.

known_unknown_senders._comment: Senders explicitly known to not be part of the expected 20 contributors. Still shown in the app, flagged as Unknown Sender.
known_unknown_senders.Zubair Khan: Not a listed contributor - needs manual investigation

_notes: name_aliases maps a raw Sender Name (after trim/case-fold) to the canonical name found in expected_people.csv.
Any sender not in name_aliases and not an exact (case-insensitive) match to an expected name is treated as Unknown Sender.
memo_aliases is cosmetic only - it does not affect matching, just cleans up display text.
partial_payment_threshold is the fraction of ExpectedAmount below which a matched payment is flagged Partial (1.0 = anything under expected).
